description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the clojure:lein-2.7.0 Docker image. Add a before_script that runs wget -q https://numergent.com/downloads/phantomjs-2.1.1-linux-x86_64.tar.bz2, then tar -xvf phantomjs-2.1.1-linux-x86_64.tar.bz2, updates PATH to include ./phantomjs-2.1.1-linux-x86_64/bin/, and executes lein deps. Define a test job named test in the default test stage that runs lein with-profile test doo once. The pipeline has no services, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
